title: Livebase README
content:
# Livebase

**English** | [дёӯж–Ү](#дёӯж–Ү)

> Keep durable working context alive so recurring agent tasks do not restart from zero.

Livebase is an **AI Agent skill** (for Codex, Claude Code, and similar coding agents). It provides a local-first structured store that lets agents preserve context, standards, decisions, and residue across task sessions.

---

## Quick start

```bash
# 1. Install dependencies
bun install

# 2. Initialize the store
bun run init

# 3. Create a project
bun run project create "My Project" --description "..."

# 4. Ingest source material
bun run ingest ./path/to/file.md --project <project_id>

# 5. Retrieve context before work
bun run retrieve <project_id>

# 6. Package a task for an adapter
bun run pack <project_id> --goal "What the adapter should do" --adapter grasp

# 7. Write back residue after work
bun run writeback result.json
# or: echo '<json>' | bun run writeback

# Run tests
bun test
```

All commands output structured **JSON** to stdout. Errors go to stderr.

---

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `bun run init` | Initialize store directories |
| `bun run project create\|list\|show\|update` | Manage projects |
| `bun run ingest <file>` | Ingest a source file into the store |
| `bun run retrieve <project_id>` | Generate a ContextPack (before starting work) |
| `bun run pack <project_id> --goal "..."` | Generate a TaskPackage for an adapter |
| `bun run writeback [file.json]` | Process a WriteBackPackage after work |

---

## Operating loop

```
PREPARE    вҶ’  bun run retrieve <project_id>
ACT        вҶ’  bun run pack <project_id> --goal "..." вҶ’ hand to adapter
VERIFY     вҶ’  adapter returns evidence-backed result
WRITE BACK вҶ’  bun run writeback result.json
STRENGTHEN вҶ’  residue saved; next retrieve includes it
```

---

## Project layout

```
livebase-main/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ SKILL.md              вҶҗ Agent entry point (read this first)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ schemas/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ objects.ts        вҶҗ Source, Note, Project, Entity, Residue, ContextPack
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ task-package.ts   вҶҗ TaskPackage schema (Livebase вҶ’ adapter)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ write-back.ts     вҶҗ WriteBackPackage schema (adapter вҶ’ Livebase)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ scripts/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ lib/store.ts      вҶҗ Shared store utilities
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ init.ts           вҶҗ bun run init
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ project.ts        вҶҗ bun run project ...
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ingest.ts         вҶҗ bun run ingest
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ retrieve.ts       вҶҗ bun run retrieve
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ pack.ts           вҶҗ bun run pack
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ writeback.ts      вҶҗ bun run writeback
в”ңв”Җв”Җ store/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ sources/          вҶҗ Source JSON files
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ notes/            вҶҗ Note JSON files
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ projects/         вҶҗ Project JSON files
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ entities/         вҶҗ Entity JSON files
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ residue/          вҶҗ Residue JSON files
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ context-packs/    вҶҗ ContextPack JSON files
в””в”Җв”Җ tests/
    в””в”Җв”Җ integration.test.ts  вҶҗ Full cycle E2E test
```

---

## Store format

All objects are flat **JSON files** вҖ” directly readable, editable, and diffable. No database required.

```
store/projects/proj-my-project-lv3kj.json
store/sources/src-role-definition-lv4ab.json
store/residue/res-ownership-signal-lv5cd.json
```

---

## Adapters

Livebase is the durable context center. Adapters execute in specific environments.

- **grasp** вҶ’ browser execution adapter
- More adapters can be added without changing the core

```
Livebase (prepares context)
  вҶ’ TaskPackage вҶ’ Adapter (executes)
  вҶ’ WriteBackPackage вҶ’ Livebase (writes residue)
```

---

## Requirements

- [Bun](https://bun.sh) вүҘ 1.0

---

# дёӯж–Ү

> и®©жҢҒд№…е·ҘдҪңдёҠдёӢж–ҮдҝқжҢҒжҙ»и·ғпјҢи®©еҸҚеӨҚеҸ‘з”ҹзҡ„ Agent д»»еҠЎдёҚеҶҚжҜҸж¬Ўд»Һйӣ¶ејҖе§ӢгҖӮ

Livebase жҳҜдёҖдёӘ **AI Agent Skill**пјҲйҖӮз”ЁдәҺ CodexгҖҒClaude Code зӯү coding agentпјүгҖӮе®ғжҸҗдҫӣдёҖдёӘжң¬ең°дјҳе…Ҳзҡ„з»“жһ„еҢ–еӯҳеӮЁеұӮпјҢи®© agent иғҪеңЁд»»еҠЎ session д№Ӣй—ҙдҝқз•ҷдёҠдёӢж–ҮгҖҒж ҮеҮҶгҖҒеҲӨж–ӯе’Ң residueгҖӮ

### еҝ«йҖҹејҖе§Ӣ

```bash
bun install
bun run init
bun run project create "жҲ‘зҡ„йЎ№зӣ®"
bun run ingest ./file.md --project <project_id>
bun run retrieve <project_id>   # ејҖе§Ӣе·ҘдҪңеүҚ
bun run writeback result.json   # е®ҢжҲҗе·ҘдҪңеҗҺ
```

### ж ёеҝғеҫӘзҺҜ

```
еҮҶеӨҮдёҠдёӢж–Ү вҶ’ з”ҹжҲҗ TaskPackage вҶ’ Adapter жү§иЎҢ вҶ’ еҶҷеӣһ residue вҶ’ дёӢдёҖиҪ®жӣҙејә
```

жүҖжңүе‘Ҫд»Өиҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ– JSONпјҢй”ҷиҜҜиҫ“еҮәеҲ° stderrгҖӮ  
иҜҰи§Ғ [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) иҺ·еҸ–е®Ңж•ҙ agent ж“ҚдҪңжҢҮд»ӨгҖӮ
